THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN, JOSEPH DEFENDANT JOSEPH MCLAUGHLIN TO RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF ROBERT BOSCHELLI JUDGMENT IN NET AMOUNT OF $10,141.79.
